_comment: Regression floor measured from the green run at the live threshold (0.65) on the 18-case golden set (2026-06-09). meanNdcgAtK = ranker ceiling; injectedF1/quietAccuracy = gated-set quality; maxForbidViolations = the 2 known channel-distractor leaks (envelope-strip case) pending the R4 usefulness gate. Tighten these as retrieval improves.
